linkedin.caption:
New EB28 growth brief: Private AI vs ChatGPT for Business: How to Choose the Right Workflow

The useful question is not whether one tool is always better. It is which workflow can safely handle the data, review step, and lead path in front of you.

https://eb28.co/blog/private-ai-vs-chatgpt-for-business-how-to-choose-the-right-workflow/

shortFormVideo.hook: Private AI vs ChatGPT is not a tool debate. It is a data-boundary decision.
script: Start with the workflow, not the model.
If the task is drafting low-risk copy, a hosted assistant may be enough.
If the task touches client history, internal documents, finance notes, or SOPs, map a private retrieval path first.
The win is speed with governance: clear access rules, human review, and a lead path you can measure.
shortFormVideo.visualBrief: 45-second vertical video with split-screen workflow cards: hosted AI for low-risk drafting, private AI for sensitive data, then a final CTA card pointing to the EB28 project brief.
shortFormVideo.caption: Private AI vs ChatGPT for business comes down to workflow risk, not hype. Read the guide at eb28.co/blog/.
